programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Alpaca Allure: A Hawke's Bay couple develop alpaca farming.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Rookie recovery op Joe has a challenge on his hands when a delivery van slides off the road. In Ruislip, there's a mammoth problem for recovery operator Michael.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Robbie unveils his big retro garage. In Southern California, the Wolfe brothers come face-to-face with the King of Signs, as well as discovering the Holy Grail of 3D signs.

programme.title: The Office U.S
programme.desc: After the office gets robbed, Michael decides to hold an auction to raise money for all the items lost.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Still homeless, the Huangs move in with Honey and Marvin; Jessica gets a chance to compete on "Wheel of Fortune"; Eddie starts high school; Michael Bolton offers Louis some help.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart accidentally sees a new superhero movie a month before it comes out - and the world cowers before his newfound plot-spoiling powers.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Marge implements a screen time limit for the whole family, she realises that she is the one addicted – not Homer and the kids.

programme.title: New: Rookie Truckers
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Rookie Truckers follows the gritty and gripping journey as new recruits become road warriors in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: When a tourist goes missing, it's panic stations for the Clermont Diggers. And in Ballarat, Pretty Prospector April is in the line of fire, when Ian’s homemade trommel “Jaws” comes off the rails.

programme.title: Outrageous Fortune
programme.desc: Van, the legend, makes a new best friend. Judd gets a big cheque and a new associate - if an old adversary doesn't stuff things up.

programme.title: Head High
programme.desc: As both teams compete in the 1A semi-finals, Mana has some devastating news for Renee.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny and Bajie meet a powerful warrior with a tragic past reminiscent of Sunny's own. The Widow prepares for a showdown and MK learns a secret.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: The Widow's fight for liberation puts her in an epic showdown with the other Barons who have joined forces against her, while Quinn enacts his revenge.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart accidentally sees a new superhero movie a month before it comes out - and the world cowers before his newfound plot-spoiling powers.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Marge implements a screen time limit for the whole family, she realises that she is the one addicted – not Homer and the kids.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: When Louis and Jessica are pressured into volunteering due to budget cuts at school, the kids see a new side of their parents.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Robbie unveils his big retro garage. In Southern California, the Wolfe brothers come face-to-face with the King of Signs, as well as discovering the Holy Grail of 3D signs.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: The team uncovers what appears to be a wooden doorway under Samuel Ball's property and a new Templar connection is made when an ancient tool is discovered in the swamp.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: The Long Drove: McKenzie Country run-holder Peter Mackay droves his sheep to sale.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Southern Soil: A couple new to dairying work hard to protect the environment on their Southland farm.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A coach that has driven off the road into a hedgerow needs to be rescued before rush hour traffic gets disrupted. A dustbin lorry has gotten stuck in the mud on a narrow country road.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Wolfe brothers uncover an overgrown vintage Cadillac graveyard in the woods, and peel back the layers of a gargantuan California stockpile.

programme.title: The Office U.S
programme.desc: Pam is embarrassed when she is the only person at Corporate wearing a costume on Halloween. Holly and Michael take the long trip to Nashua after they get some shocking news from corporate.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Eddie wants to join the football team, despite Jessica forbidding him to try out; Emery learns Evan will be in middle school with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart bonds with Ned Flanders, which leaves Homer jealous, so he retaliates by mentoring Nelson Muntz.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Maggie goes to preschool, Marge decides to get a job to pass the time and ends up working at an upscale weed dispensary.

programme.title: New: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Marian arrives in Westminster, dazzled by its splendor. Rob gains Little John’s aid, but the Sheriff’s hunt intensifies after a Norman is killed.

programme.title: New: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Rob and his band target the Sheriff’s reward money - a bold heist that could change their fortunes, if it doesn’t first get them killed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team is shocked and saddened when Grissom makes a stunning announcement.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The first day on the job for Dr. Langston turns from bad to worse when a simple burglary case quickly overlaps with a complicated arson and homicide case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When an FBI agent who was working undercover is found brutally murdered, the CSI team is called in to assist the victim's partner in finding the killer.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart bonds with Ned Flanders, which leaves Homer jealous, so he retaliates by mentoring Nelson Muntz.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Maggie goes to preschool, Marge decides to get a job to pass the time and ends up working at an upscale weed dispensary.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia: Celebrity Edition
programme.desc: Season Finale: The final three teams battle it out in Bangkok for the winning title and $100, 000 for charity.

programme.title: Saving Lives At Sea
programme.desc: The North Berwick crew race out to try and save a windsurfer battling the seas, as he and they fight the gale force winds of Storm Dennis, on the east coast of Scotland.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: Rick and river-searching expert Beau head to Salisbury as they visit the River Avon, investigating one of the most historic sites in the UK while exploring the area's wildlife and culture.

programme.title: Resto My Ride
programme.desc: Pete loved to drive his beloved XW Falcon Wagon to his Grand Mothers and drive the country roads with her sharing with her his dreams of one day having the car restored.

programme.title: NZ Hunter Adventures
programme.sub-title: A Stealth Approach On The Southern Lands
programme.desc: Equipped with some QuietKat E-Bikes, Willie joins friends Scott and Hannah on a West Otago meat gathering mission, before venturing into East Coast tahr country with budding Auckland hunter Ben.
